headline: Baltimore's Go-To Plumber — Fast, Reliable, No Runaround
subheadline: Finding a trustworthy plumber shouldn't be a gamble. MD Plumbing & Heating connects Maryland homeowners with vetted local pros who show up on time and get it done right.
service_descriptions: From leaky pipes and fixture replacements to whole-house re-pipes, we solve every plumbing issue under your roof.
Clogged drains cleared the same day with professional-grade equipment — no guesswork, no recurring blockages.
Installation, repair, and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters with minimal disruption to your home.
Burst pipe at midnight? Flooded basement on a Sunday? We dispatch fast because plumbing emergencies don't wait.
Furnace, boiler, or heat pump giving you trouble? Our heating techs diagnose fast and restore warmth to your home.
Camera inspections and full sewer line repair or replacement — we find the problem before it becomes a disaster.

reviews.text: I had a pipe burst in my basement on a Friday night. Called MD Plumbing and someone was at my door within 90 minutes. The tech was calm, explained everything clearly, and had it fixed before midnight. Absolute lifesaver.

Used them twice now — once for a water heater replacement and again for a stubborn clog. Both times the guys were on time, kept the work area clean, and the pricing was exactly what they quoted. No surprise charges. I'll keep using them.
Good service, honest pricing, showed up when they said they would. Diagnosed my heating issue in 20 minutes when two other companies told me I needed a full replacement — just needed a part.

issues_addressed: No specific differentiator on current site
Generic directory-style site with no trust signals
